disabled.description: Disables the file picker and drag-and-drop surface.

multiple.description: Allow more than one file. Default `false`.

name.description: Native input name used for form submission.

id.description: Stable id for the native file input. Required when composing with `FormField`.

maxSize.description: Maximum allowed file size in bytes.

unsupportedProps.name: dragActive
unsupportedProps.description: Replaces the default drag-active dropzone body.

unsupportedProps.name: fileList
unsupportedProps.description: Replaces the default file-list renderer. Receives the resolved rows.

unsupportedProps.name: files
unsupportedProps.description: Consumer-driven file rows, including upload progress and error states.

unsupportedProps.name: idle
unsupportedProps.description: Replaces the default resting-state dropzone body.

unsupportedProps.name: onchange
unsupportedProps.description: Fires with accepted files after local validation passes.

unsupportedProps.name: onreject
unsupportedProps.description: Fires with rejected files and reasons after local validation runs.
